Text.Page:
There's no word on reinforcements from {@Rgn:32008$$Holdouts Redoubt}.

I understand it’s a difficult situation, but please go there and tell Hallaj we really need those troops.
So, Qale's short on manpower, eh? Well, so are we. Besides, I’m not in charge of troop management, Nashwa is. See her if you have questions.

Yeah, I heard Hallaj all the way over here.

Sadly, he's right. We have no reinforccements we can send to Qale. I'm sorry you came all this way for bad news. I wish it could be different.
